---
title: "Teaching"
description: "Courses and teaching materials"
---

<h2>Franklin University Switzerland</h2>
<h3>Undergraduate</h3>
<ul>
  <li>
  POL 300: Comparative Politics
  </li>
  <li>
    POL 377: International Political Economy
    <a href="https://giacomolemoli.github.io/uploads/syllabus/pol-377-spring-2026-syllabus.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank">Syllabus</a>
    <a href="https://github.com/giacomolemoli/fus-pol-377" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank">Course material</a>
  </li>
</ul>

<h2>New York University</h2>
<h3>Graduate</h3>
<ul>
  <li>
    POL-GA 1251: Quantitative Political Analysis II
    <a href="https://github.com/giacomolemoli/quant2-labs-spring-2023" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank">Lab material</a>
  </li>
  <li>
    POL-GA 1120: Quantitative Analysis I
  </li>
</ul>

<h3>Undergraduate</h3>
<ul>
  <li>
    POL-UA 300: Power &amp; Politics in America
  </li>
  <li>
    POL-UA 850: Introduction to Research Methods for Politics
  </li>
  <li>
    POL-UA 500: Introduction to Comparative Politics
  </li>
  <li>Data Teaching Assistant for the Politics Department</li>
</ul>
